title: AST Assault in the 4th Degree DV, Assault in the Presence of a Child: Ketchikan [AK25029146]
incident_type: Assault in the 4th Degree DV, Assault in the Presence of a Child
summary: On 03/29/2025 at about 2122 hours, the Alaska State Troopers received a report of a disturbance at a residence on Fireweed Lane. Investigation revealed that Bennetta Charles, age 43 of Klawock assaulted a family member at the residence. Charles was arrested for Assault in the 4th Degree DV and Assault in the Presence of a Child and remanded to Ketchikan Correctional Center with No Bail. Alcohol was a factor.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
topic: Assault in the 4th Degree DV, Assault in the Presence of a Child

charges: Assault in the Presence of a Child
entities.address_detail: a residence on Fireweed Lane

title: AST Warrant Arrest: Ketchikan [AK25028561]
summary: On 03/29/2025 at about 2005 hours, the Alaska State Troopers contacted and arrested Craig Newman, age 30 of Ketchikan on D-1 Loop Road. Newman had an outstanding arrest warrant issued by the Ketchikan Courthouse for failure to appear stemming from the original charge of DUI. Newman was transported and remanded to Ketchikan Correctional Center with bail set at $500.00.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
